name: All Canadian Coffee
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Coffee, hot, black, double strength
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the topping by whipping cream with maple syrup until soft mounds are achieved. Set aside.
2. Divide the maple syrup and whiskey among 4 warmed heat-proof glass mugs or goblets.
3. Pour coffee to about 1 inch from the top of each mug.
4. Spoon the topping over the coffee.
5. Decorate with tiny Canadian flags if desired.
Makes: 4 Servings
